results.name: simple-find
results.notes: Perfect match. Correct query type, field name, and value.

results.name: find-with-filter-projection-sort-limit
results.notes: Functionally correct but uses $regex instead of $search for text matching. Missing full-text search capabilities and relevance scoring.

results.name: geo-based-find
results.notes: Excellent. Correct geospatial operator, coordinate order, and radius calculation.

results.name: find-translates-to-agg-mode-count
results.notes: Perfect. Correctly identified need for aggregation and generated proper pipeline.

results.name: relative-date-find-last-year
results.notes: Correct date calculation (2026 - 1 = 2025) using current date context.

results.name: find-with-non-english
results.notes: Correctly interprets Spanish and generates appropriate aggregation for field renaming.

results.name: agg-complex-regex-split
results.notes: Complex pipeline correctly handles text splitting, grouping, and dual-level sorting.

results.name: agg-join-lookup
results.notes: Proper $lookup join with correct field mapping and output shaping.

strengths: Correctly chooses between find and aggregation queries
Validates field names against schema before use
Handles geospatial queries with proper coordinate order
Always fetches context (indexes, schema, samples) before generating
areas_for_improvement: Should prefer Atlas Search ($search) over $regex for text matching
Consider detecting when full-text search capabilities would be beneficial
recommendations: Add guidance in SKILL.md about when to use $search vs $regex
Consider checking if Atlas Search index exists before choosing search method
Update test 2 assertion to expect $search instead of $regex
